message:
fix(timer): gate coalescing on min_group_size threshold

Previously, coalescing always pulled in timers within the coalesce
window regardless of how many were actually present.  When fewer than
min_group_size timers fell within the window, timers fired earlier than
their deadline with no batching benefit.

Now collect_expired and coalescing_group_size both check whether the
in-window count meets min_group_size before applying the coalesced
boundary, falling back to exact-deadline semantics otherwise.

Splits the existing test and adds a new test for the threshold-met path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
